interactions.label: Buy Quick Food
interactions.description: Convenience food fills the shelf. It is not as healthy as the cafeteria, but it is fast and reliable.

interactions.label: Buy Drink
interactions.description: Cold drinks line the fridge. A quick boost now might cost you later.

interactions.label: Heat Instant Noodles
interactions.description: Steam rises from the hot water station. Deep-night comfort is only one cup away.

interactions.label: Shop Counter
interactions.description: The cashier counter handles checkouts, shift work, and awkward late-night encounters.

interactions.label: Take Night Shift
interactions.description: A spare apron hangs nearby. Working the late shift pays well, but drains you fast.
